grade.summary: Critical process violations: merged with failing CI, missing required package configuration files, single mega-commit, no changeset. Code quality is excellent but process discipline broke down completely.

testsBeforeImplementation.evidence: No session transcript available to verify TDD process. Only one commit (1,701 lines) suggests batch implementation rather than test-first.

redGreenCycle.evidence: Cannot verify without transcript. Commit message mentions 'Added failing tests' which suggests TDD awareness.

oneTestAtATime.evidence: Cannot verify without transcript. Single commit pattern is a red flag.

qualityGatesBeforeCommit.evidence: CI check-runs show 'Lint, typecheck, test: failure' on commit 4196bc978402322983a77a1cc4705ff477c93152. PR was merged with failing CI.

noSkipsOrIgnores.evidence: Code review shows no @ts-ignore, as any, .skip, or --no-verify in diff.

testsExist.evidence: 74 tests across 3 test files (scaffold.test.ts, prompts.test.ts, templates.test.ts). Test coverage is comprehensive.

testQuality.evidence: Tests use proper assertions, temp directories for file system tests, mocks for readline, cover positive and negative cases, runtime-specific behaviors.

branchCreated.evidence: Branch feat/ui-030-create-vertz-app created before work. Git log shows branch creation timestamp.

atomicCommits.evidence: Single mega-commit with 1,701 lines across 9 files. Should have been 5-7 atomic commits (package setup, types, prompts, scaffold, templates, CLI, integration).

changesetAdded.evidence: No changeset file found in commit 9c9ae6b. Checked with: git show 9c9ae6b --name-only | grep .changeset

botScriptsUsed.evidence: Cannot verify without transcript. Commit author is vertz-advocate[bot] which suggests correct bot identity.

noPushToMain.evidence: PR #256 was used. No direct push to main detected.

ciPassed.evidence: GitHub API check-runs for commit 4196bc9: 'Lint, typecheck, test: failure'. PR merged despite failing CI.

requiredFilesPresent.evidence: Missing package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bunup.config.ts for the new package. Only source code files shipped. Git ls-tree shows no config files.

filesMatchScope.evidence: All changes in packages/create-vertz-app/. No scope creep detected.

designDocCompliance.evidence: Design doc phase-11-create-vertz-app.md requires package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bunup.config.ts. None were created. Source files match design but package config is missing.

deviationsEscalated.evidence: Template flag was removed (design doc says 'Include a --template flag'). Commit message explains rationale but no evidence of escalation to VP Eng or Tech Lead.

developerWalkthrough.evidence: Cannot pass Developer Walkthrough. Package.json missing means cannot install dependencies, cannot publish to npm, cannot run 'npm create vertz-app'. Feature is non-functional.

acceptanceCriteriaIncludeOutcomes.evidence: Ticket ui-030 states 'Must work out of the box after install + dev' - clear user outcome.

examplesUsePublicAPI.evidence: Example health module uses only public @vertz/core APIs. No internal imports detected.

verticalSlices.evidence: Single-phase implementation with end-to-end functionality (would be functional if package.json existed).

documentationComplete.evidence: CLI help is clear, template comments guide users, example module demonstrates best practices.

noEvalOrNewFunction.evidence: No eval() or new Function() found in diff.

noHardcodedSecrets.evidence: No hardcoded secrets in diff. .env file uses placeholders.

inputSanitization.evidence: Runtime validation present (InvalidRuntimeError). Directory existence check prevents overwrites. Minor suggestion: add project name validation for path traversal.

violations.rule: Quality gates must pass before merge
violations.description: PR merged with failing CI. GitHub check-runs show 'Lint, typecheck, test: failure' on the merged commit.
violations.evidence: gh api repos/vertz-dev/vertz/commits/4196bc978402322983a77a1cc4705ff477c93152/check-runs shows: 'Lint, typecheck, test: failure'
violations.recommendation: Add branch protection rule requiring all CI checks to pass before merge. Never merge failing CI.

violations.rule: New packages require package.json and build config
violations.description: Design doc requires package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bunup.config.ts for the new package. None were created. Feature is non-functional without package.json.
violations.evidence: git ls-tree -r 9c9ae6b packages/create-vertz-app/ | grep -E 'package\.json|tsconfig\.json' returns no results
violations.recommendation: Create immediate follow-up PR adding all required package configuration files. Add checklist to PR template for new packages.

violations.description: Single commit with 1,701 lines across 9 files. Should have been 5-7 atomic commits for package setup, types, prompts, scaffold, templates, CLI, and integration.
violations.evidence: git show 4196bc978402322983a77a1cc4705ff477c93152 --stat shows: 9 files changed, 1701 insertions(+)
violations.recommendation: Enforce commit size limits. Flag PRs with single commits >500 lines for mandatory review.

violations.description: New package create-vertz-app added without changeset file for version management.
violations.evidence: git show 9c9ae6b --name-only | grep .changeset returns no results
violations.recommendation: Add changeset in follow-up PR. Consider CI check that blocks merge if changeset is missing.

violations.description: Feature cannot pass Developer Walkthrough (Definition of Done gate). Without package.json, cannot install dependencies, publish to npm, or run 'npm create vertz-app'.
violations.evidence: Ticket ui-030 requires 'Must work out of the box after install + dev'. Missing package.json makes this impossible.
violations.recommendation: Do not close ticket until Developer Walkthrough passes. Add follow-up PR with package config and verify end-to-end.

violations.description: Design doc explicitly lists required files that were not created. Template flag was removed without documented escalation.
violations.evidence: phase-11-create-vertz-app.md shows package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bunup.config.ts in required files list. Commit message says 'Removed unused --template flag' but design doc says to include it.
violations.recommendation: When deviating from design doc, escalate to VP Eng or Tech Lead and document decision in commit/PR.

positives: Code quality is excellent: strict TypeScript, custom error classes, proper type guards, no type hacks
Test coverage is comprehensive: 74 tests across 3 files, proper mocking, temp directories, runtime-specific coverage
Review process worked well: 3 review cycles, adversarial reviews caught critical issues, changes were addressed
No security issues: no eval, no hardcoded secrets, input validation present
Scope discipline: all changes within packages/create-vertz-app/, no scope creep
Error handling: descriptive messages, context included, proper error classes
Documentation: clear CLI help, helpful template comments, example module demonstrates best practices

recommendations.action: Add missing package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, bunup.config.ts in follow-up PR
Verify Developer Walkthrough passes after package config is added
Add branch protection rule requiring all CI checks to pass before merge
Require session transcript archival for all bot work to enable TDD audits
Add PR template checklist for new packages (package.json, tsconfig, test config, changeset)
Enforce commit atomicity: flag PRs with single commits >500 lines
Add CI check that blocks merge if changeset is missing for package changes
Add project name validation to prevent path traversal attacks (defensive improvement)
